# Count Registry (Digest)

Compact reference. Read full `SKILL.md` for details.

## Source of Truth

All counts live in `tools/registry/count-manifest.json`. Validators auto-compute actual
values from filesystem globs. No file should hard-code these numbers.

## How to Reference Counts

1. **Prefer descriptive language** — "specialized agents and subagents", "the skill catalog"
2. **When exact numbers are needed**, read `tools/registry/count-manifest.json`

> _See SKILL.md for full content._

## Canonical Phrasing

| Entity       | Phrase                             |
| ------------ | ---------------------------------- |
| Agents       | "specialized agents and subagents" |
| Skills       | "the skill catalog"                |
| Instructions | "instruction files"                |
| Validators   | "the validation suite"             |
